one_time_description: Agricultural Benefits Specific Claim settlement from Canada under Treaty 8, totaling $21,821,104 received during the year
economic_notes: Nation has two incorporated subsidiaries (327938 Alberta Ltd. and Kapawe'no First Nation Oil & Gas Company Limited), a childcare society, a wellness services society, and an Agricultural Benefits Settlement Trust. Per capita distributions of $13,350,000 made to adult members from settlement proceeds. Minor members' PCD held in trust.
notes: Prior period restatement applied to 2022 figures due to insufficient ISC funding recognized in 2022 ($317,082 increase). Large one-time Agricultural Benefits Specific Claim settlement of $21,821,104 received under Treaty 8 dominates 2023 revenues and expenses. Agricultural Benefits Trust consolidated as subsidiary. Per capita distributions of $13,350,000 expensed. Bridge loan of $9,845,500 from RBC obtained and repaid within the year for PCD payments. Nation is member of LSLIRC which negotiates and allocates federal funding. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. Restricted cash includes $247,682 externally restricted (Province of Alberta) and $3,379,523 internally restricted. osr calculated as total revenue minus LSLIRC, ISC Health, DNR, and Province of Alberta transfers.
